steps.n: Found at the Cocoon of the Empyrean SoG after defeating Mohg. Speak to her for lore regarding Miquella and the Land of Shadow
First area after interacting with the arm coming out of the cocoon in the Mohg boss arena. Upon reaching the new area, exit the cave to reach the new region
First SoG after exiting the cave in the new region
Head Northeast from the Gravesite Plain SoG, toward the Belurat legacy dungeon
Continue North through the Scorched Ruins to find its SoG
Dropped by the Pot-Wielding Shadow Undead near the cemetary to the East of the Scorched Ruins
Continue South and then Southeast from the Pot-Wielding Shadow enemy, and up a small cliff to find a headless corpse statue. Interact with it to receive this item
Continue South/Southwest from the Revered Spirit Ashes item and find this surrounded by spirit gravestones.NOTE: Need to do this at night to see the spirit gravestones
From the Scorched Ruins or from the Larval Tear in the previous step, head South along the road and then into the woods. Enemy walks around the woods. Drops the Beast Claw
Found by continuing along the road from the Scorched Ruins, leading South and then curving back North/Northeast
Two are found in the Church of Consolation
Return to the Scorched Ruins SoG, then head directly West until you find the decaying trees and a building, surrounded by giant bird creatures
Found inside the Western Nameless Mausoleum. Drops Greatsword of Solitude and the Solitude Set
Return to the Scorched Ruins SoG and head North/Northeast. Try and avoid the large fire giant for now. Continue until you see a large doorway and you will find this SoG nearby
Found near the Three Path Cross SoG. Interact with this
Found near the Three Path Cross SoG. Interact with this
Found near the Three Path Cross SoG. Interact with this. Speak to them for dialogue and to advance their quest
Found near the Three Path Cross SoG. Interact with this. Speak to them for dialogue and to advance their quest. They will give you the Cross Map
Given to you by Hornsent near the Three Path Cross SoG

Return to the Three Path Cross SoG and head West through the large doorway and follow the road until just before the large stairwell. You will find two more NPCs here as well as another Miquella Cross
Found near the Main Gate Cross SoG. Interact with it
Found near the Main Gate Cross SoG
Found near the Main Gate Cross SoG. Exhaust dialogue
Found near the Main Gate Cross SoG. Exhaust dialogue. Is a merchant. Purchase one item from them to unlock dialogue. NOTE: DO NOT KILL FOR BELL-BEARING YET
Return to him and ask about the person in the armor to get additional lore
Look to the South of the Main Gate Cross SoG for a hidden path. Take this to a hidden area and the Cliffroad Terminus SoG
Found by following the secret path South from the Main Gate Cross SoG
Found South of the Cliffroad Terminus SoG
Dropped by the Pot-Wielding Shadow Undead West of the Prospect Town near the graveyard
Return to the Cliffroad Terminus SoG and then head East/Southeast. Look for the pond with the turtles and find this on an altar
Head South until you find a location with glowing gravestones to find this. NOTE: Need to do this at night to find this
Near where you found the Larval Tear, or South from the Revered Spirit Ashes. Speak to Forager Brood (pest creature) for the Forager Brood Cookbook 2
From the large lightning ram enemies, continue South by hugging the cliffs to the West and you'll find a small cave that leads to this
Head back through the hidden cave where you came from, then make your way onto the plateau above you to the East. Contains the Incursion Painting
Return to the Three Path Cross SoG, then head North along the road until you find this SoG, just outside the Abandoned Ailing Village
Just past the Greatbridge, North SoG
On the altar near the cliff edge to the East
Head back to the Greatbridge, North SoG, then head East to find this near spectral gravestones. NOTE: Need to do this at night
Found South/Southeast from the Abandoned Ailing Village, follow the cliff edge down
Found in the lake to the West of the Greatbridge, North SoG. NOTE: Can be a difficult fight. Drops Dragon Heart and Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone
Dropped by the Ghostflame Dragon near the Greatbridge, North SoG
Dropped by the Ghostflame Dragon near the Greatbridge, North SoG
Head West from the lake with the Ghostflame Dragon and head past the broken cages on the ground. You will find the entrance to this. Follow the tunnel to find the SoG

Head Southeast and look for a pot over the ledge to jump down to. Do this again and get to the stone bridge you were at before. Jump to the Jar to the Southeast, then to the stone pillars coming up fr
Return to the Main Gate Cross SoG to begin this legacy dungeon. From here, continue up the stairs and enter the large door
Continue up the next set of stairs. Found on the altar in the room with the first giant scorpion
Continue through another door and up the stairs, then through another door to get outside. Continue along the path to find this SoG

From the Belurat, Tower Settlement SoG, head Southeast. Continue past the fountain and up the stairs slightly to the right. Continue Southeast, under the bridge with the ranged enemies,  up the ramp a

Head into the next room, outside, and up the stairs to the North. Turn right and continue through a rubble area heading Northeast until you pass under an archway leading to a large fountain. He will i
Return to the Small Private altar SoG, then head out the same door as before, but head up the stairs to the Northwest then immediately cut right. Continue along this route, turn left, then look for a

Continue outside from the Storeroom Key, then look for a red roof you can jump to next to some stairs. Hop onto this and then the bridge connecting the two buildings. Go into the building on the other

Return to the stairs near the room with the Storeroom Key, then head up the stairs. Take the left stairs down, then left and down again and you will find an elevator. Ride this down to create a shortc
Return to the alley then climb over the rubble to find another door. Continue up the stairs and through the door in the back left. Found near the MIquella Cross
Dropped by the Pot-Wielding Shadow Undead enemy
Continue across the bridge, then down the street on the left. Continue along the street until you find a plaza with enemies praying. Find this on the altar nearby
Continue up the stairs and into the tower and continue up the stairs until you exit. This SoG will be right before the boss door
Return to the Small Private Altar SoG, then head out the left doorway and across the bridge. Use the Storeroom Key obtained earlier to open this door and speak to this NPC

Return to the Belurat, Tower Settlement SoG, then head Southeast, up the stairs to the right just past the first fountain, then cut right again and head to a second fountain. A well will be on the lef
Return to the Stagefront SoG. Near the boss door, you can summon this NPC to help with the fight
Drops the Remembrance of the Dancing Lion and the Divine Beast Head Helm
Dropped by the Divine Beast Dancing Lion in Belurat
Found in the boss arena after defeating the Divine Beast Dancing Lion boss
Take the newly appeared lift and exit through the door. Near the staircase
Continue up the staircase to the top and find this on the right
Return to Hornsent Grandam and wear the newly acquired Divine Beast Head. Speak to her to receive the Watchful Spirit Incantation. Continue speaking to her (may need to reload game each time) and she
Received by speaking to Hornsent Grandam while wearing the Divine Beast Head
Return to the Three Path Cross SoG and speak to this NPC. She will have more dialogue if you summoned her for the boss fight earlier
Speak to this NPC and give them the Scorpion Stew to receive 3 Furnace Visage
Head Northeast from the Three Path Cross SoG
Continue Northeast past the camp to find this before another bridge
Found near the Castle Front SoG just before Castle Ensis

Return to the Castle Front SoG, then head North beyond the camp and into the canyon. You will eventually begin going down a slope, and will find the door to this location embedded in the side of the r
Continue past the camp in the previous step until you see a path leading to the left. Follow this South to find this SoG
Found near the Pillar Path Cross SoG
Found near the Pillar Path Cross SoG
Found near the Pillar Path Cross SoG. Sells the Deadly Poison Perfume Bottle
Return to the Main Gate Cross SoG after speaking with Thiollier and speak to them for additional dialogue
Return to the Main Gate Cross SoG after speaking with Thiollier and speak to them for additional dialogue. He will give you the Deadly Black Syrup
Given to you by Moore. Speak to him after meeting Thiollier
Return to the Pillar Path Cross SoG and he will ask you if you are weary of life and will offer to make you Thiollier's Concoction
Received from Thiollier after giving him the Deadly Black Syrup
Return to the fork and take the other path South to find this SoG
Found on the road to the West of the Pillar Path Waypoint SoG. Exhaust his dialogue
Make your way Southeast from the Gravebird Bracelets. You will come across some spectral gravestones. NOTE: Need to do this at night
Head back East, then continue South up the hill to find this monument
Found at the Suppressing Pillar Monument
Return to the Pillar Path Waypoint SoG, then continue South/Southwest. You will find this NPC invader along the path
Continue along the path and you will eventually find a cave entrance to the left in the cliff face
Continue South from where you found the Spread Crossbow and you'll find the ruins opening. There are a lot of upgrade materials in this location
Continue Southeast along the cliff face until you see a rundown structure

Head Northwest/West from the Elder's Hovel and look for a higher ledge to the right that you can climb up to. There is a sealed spirit spring here that can let you skip Castle Ensis and move on to Sca
Continue back to the main swamp area from before and head to the North, looking for a cave entrance. This leads to Ellac River
Follow the cave and before you reach the SoG, you should see this to the right hand side of another cave opening
Continue from the Revered Spirit Ash in the previous step and into the cave
Continue North along the river and fight this to receive the Horned Bairn
Continue North along the river, then look for a cave entrance in the Northern portion of the more open river area
Progress through the cave until you find the boss room. Defeat this boss for the Bloodfiend Hexer's Ashes
Return to the Castle Front SoG and head across the bridge leading Northeast. This will take you into the castle

Once inside the fort, continue to the Southeast side and to the right to find some stairs leading down into a room. take the doorway on the left, then the next doorway on the left, and continue around

Jump over the railing just past the chest to return to the room you were in before. Take the doorway now on your right, then the one on the left again. Continue around and take the doorway on your lef
Continue to the Southwest portion of this upper area and into the room on the left. Kill him for the Ash of War: Aspects of the Crucible: Wings

Return to the spirit spring from before, then jump directly to the Northeast. You should be able to land near this SoG. NOTE: Optional, it doesn't lead to any items that haven't already been addressed

Return to the beginning of Fort of Reprimand, then go inside the fort and immediately go to the Northeast section of the wall and jump down into a square hole. Continue down and into the room, then ki
Speak to him at the Pillar Path Cross SoG for additional dialogue. Speak to him and then rest (potentially multiple times) and wait for him to say that he is heading South
Return to the Three Path Cross SoG and speak to this NPC for additional dialogue about Hornsent and her broken armor
Return to the Main Gate Cross SoG and speak to him for additional dialogue

Found inside the Ruins of Unte. If you found the Stone-Sheathed Sword in Fog Rift Catacombs, you will have an option to "Raise the Sword" and create the Sword of Darkness. NOTE: Once you find the Alta
Head to the furthest point West in the Village of Flies to find this on an altar
Found inside the Eastern Nameless Mausoleum. Drops the Rakshasa Set and the Rakshasa's Great Katana
Head North, then turn right, and then turn left. Follow the path into a new room. At the bottom of the stairs, turn around to your right and go through the next tunnel. Pull this lever

Return out the doorway and drop down to the stone bridge below. Continue down the bridge and through the tunnel to the lift. At the bottom, continue North and down the stairs to your right. Follow tow

Go back through the doorway and down the ladder in the South of this room. Head through the doorway, then drop down the ledge to the bottom of this room. Head through the tunnel in the East of this ro
Head up the ladder in the room with the chest. Continue down the corridor and then drop down. Head South and down a lift. Continue South to find this boss. Drops the Barbed Staff-Spear
Found after defeating Jori, Elder Inquisitor
To begin this section, return to the Shadow Keep, Back Gate SoG

Return to the room with the Marika statue, near the Shadow Keep, Back Gate SoG. Continue through the shortcut (or open it using the O Mother emote if you haven't already). You will find this just down

These will be patrolling the area directly East of the Hinterlands SoG. You can fight them separately or together. You can also summon Swordhand of Night Jolan nearby if you have done the first task o
Return to the Hinterland SoG and head Southeast/East to find a path leading upward over a hill. This will take you to this location
Return down the path you came, then head Northeast toward a bridge. Cross the bridge to find this SoG
Continue from the Hinterland's Bridge SoG toward the East to find this grace
From the Fingerstone Hill SoG, continue Northeast and to a crater to find this boss. Defeat it to get the Gravitational Missile sorcery
Head Southeast from the Two Fingers gesture to find this near the ledge
Head South and follow the finger statues until you find the ruins
In the center of the ruins you can ring another bell for Count Ymir. Do so now and receive the Cerulean Seed Talisman +1
Head inside the Northern Nameless Mausoleum to find this boss. Drops the Red Bear's Claw and the Iron Rivet Set
Continue through the cave. Look for another tunnel on the left just before the iron gate. Follow this path and enter the second room on the right to find this in a chest
Just past the ghost in the Lamenter's Gaol

Head through the tunnel to the South, then take the left path. Continue up the ladder and through the cell door. Once in the large room from before, head toward the Northern cell door, but jump up the
After falling through the hole, head out North. Continue up some stairs and go through the second door on the right. Follow this down and drop into the pit filled with jars. Find this in a chest near
Drop down and then climb up the pile to the East to leave this room. Continue up and out the cell door. Head back toward the first door that was on your right, and roll into a little nook in the rock
Leave the room through the West cell door. Drop down and head through the North cell door and continue back up the staircase and through the cell door at the top. Follow this and drop down two ledges

At any point after you beat bosses and/or receive their remembrance, you can continue to Roundtable hold to get things from Enia. NOTE: There are only a few locations where you can duplicate a remembr
There are no areas that are locked out at any point in the game so
Return to the open area, then head up the hill toward the gate. You'll see this to the left of the gate
Found near the Castle Ensis Checkpoint SoG
Found near the Castle Ensis Checkpoint SoG
Found near the Castle Ensis Checkpoint SoG

Go to the right of the gate where an enemy is standing on a ledge. Drop down, then drop through the hole. Leave the cave and jump along the rocks to the waterfall. Go up the ladder. Continue through t

Return to the building guarded by the Carian Knight from before, and through the gate you opened past this building. Continue along this path to the Northeast until you find some stairs spiraling up a
Continue North, up the lift, and into the next room. Go up the stairs and find this SoG
Return to the Castle Lord's Chamber, then head up the stairs to the West to find this boss gate. Drops the Remembrance of the Twin Moon Knight

steps.i: Remembrance of the Twin Moon Knight
steps.n: Dropped by Rellana, Twin Moon Knight
Found after defeating Rellana, Twin Moon Knight
Leave the castle through the gateway to the North and you will be in Scadu Altus
Leave the castle through the gateway to the North and follow the path to find this SoG
Found near the Highroad Cross SoG
Found near the Highroad Cross SoG
Found near the Highroad Cross SoG. Speak to them and exhaust dialogue
Found near the Highroad Cross SoG. Speak to them and exhaust dialogue. They will give you a new Cross Map
Given to you by Hornsent near the Highroad Cross SoG
Found near the Highroad Cross SoG.Used for a questline with a monk near Moorth Ruins
Found by following the path North from the Highroad Cross SoG
Continue North along this path, found just inside the enemy camp. Retreat quickly to avoid the Furnace Golem enemy for now
Head West to find the church up the hill
Found near the Church of Crusade. Drops the Ash of War: Flame Skewer and a Prayer Room Key
Dropped by Fire Knight Queelign in the Church of Crusade
Found in the Church of Crusade. Two of them are found here
Head South at night and you will see a circle of spectral graves with this in the center
Head further South and down the hill from the Church of Crusade or the Larval Tear to find this overlooking a cliff
Return to the Main Gate Cross SoG and speak to Moore. He will give you the Forager Brood Cookbook 7 for helping the Forager Brood from before

At this time, you can go back to kill any two of the Forager Brood you've encountered before and doing so will cause Moore to invade. He will drop his shield, armor, and bell bearing. NOTE: This is no
Look for a path down to the right of the Scadu Altus, West SoG, onto one of the towers

steps.i: Portal to Ancient Ruins of Rauh
steps.n: Head Southeast from the Scadu Altus, West SoG, across the water, and up the hill to find a shrine where you can use the Imbued Sword Key from Castle Ensis. This will take you to a location in Ruah Rui
Found in front of the statue in the small soldier camp on the right of the road, near the Fire Knight's Cookbook 1

From the Ash of War: Piercing Throw, continue directly West and you will find the entrance to this forge. Or almost directly South from the Scadutree Fragment and Fire Knight's Cookbook from before. T
Leave the Ruined Forge of Starfall Past and head East back toward the road. Will be fighting some other enemies. Kill it for a Dragon Heart and a Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone
Dropped by the Ghostflame Dragon found South along the road
Dropped by the Ghostflame Dragon found South along the road
Head East from the Ghostflame Dragon and look around the cliff edge for the unlocking cairn, giving you access to a spiritspring. Then use the spiritspring to leap up to an area above Fort Reprimand
Head Southeast in this higher area to find the SoG
Found near the Scaduview Cross SoG
Found near the Scaduview Cross SoG
Continue along the road South from the Ghostflame Dragon and you'll come up to a cave. Continue through the cave and once outside again, climb up the small ledge to your right to find this SoG
Found just Southeast of the Moorth Highway South SoG
Return to the Moorth highway South SoG, then head North along the road. Continue until you see the ruins and the first SoG on your right
Found near the Moorth Ruins SoG
Interact with this cross at the Moorth Ruins SoG
Found at the Moorth Ruins SoG. Use the emote on the Monk's Missive key item and defeat him in combat to get the Dryleaf Arts and Dryleaf Hat
Dropped by Pot-Wielding Shadow Undead in Moorth Ruins
Continue to the Eastern outskirts of the Moorth Ruins, look for a large headless body just past a building that is draped

From the Shattered Stone Talisman, carefully jump to a slight ledge in the rockface to the South (use torrent). Then carefully turn around and drop down to more ruined building. Alternatively, you can

Leave the room, then head to the right and look for a platform you can jump down to. Then jump down again and enter the cave in the East just past the building. Ascend the latter and you will be at th
Continue East in the Bonny Village and jump into the ravine that splits the village. Head North and you will eventually come across this
Head South of this first section of the Bonny Village and continue across the bridge. Continue South and you will find the entrance to this on the right

Head out the giant hole and out the door. Continue to the right and back into the room from before. Continue through the next door, and down the square hole again. Head through the West tunnel. You wi

Head back to the ledge with the pots and jump down the pots until one goes down to the stone bridge you saw before. Cross the bridge and jump down to the left. Follow the path and head down the stairs
Head to the East part of the Bonny Village and cross the long bridge. Find this to the right after getting across the bridge
Continue along the next bridge to the Northeast and find this to the right once you get across
Continue North along the path as it winds up the hill and you will eventually find this SoG
Find this directly East of the Church District Highroad SoG

To unlock the Spirit Spring that lets you enter Rabbath's Rise, you need to go inside, and follow the stairs up. In one of the rooms, you'll see two archways to the right of a bookshelf with walls cov
Return to the Church District Highroad SoG, then head West at night. You will find spectral gravestones with this item in the center
From the Larval Tear from before, continue directly South to find this SoG inside the cathedral
Continue through the doorway near the Cathedral of Manus Metyr SoG and speak to exhaust dialogue and receive the Hole-Laden Necklace and the Ruins Map
Given to you by Count Ymir. Used to ring the bells at the two Finger Ruins
Given to you by Count Ymir. Used to locate the Finger Ruins of Rhia
Go out behind the Cathedral and look for this near the pond. Used to duplicate any remembrance
Continue East until you find a lake with this boss in it. Drops the Pelt of Ralva armor
From the Ralva the Great Red Bear boss area, head back West at night and look for an area leading up. You'll find some gravestones in a circle, go here to receive the Larval Tear
Head back down from where you obtained the Ash of War: Rolling Sparks and then North. You will find this in a hut near the wall
Continue to the Shadow Keep Gates and as you get near, a loud noise will happen and a message will pop up saying a Great Rune was broken
Go to the Highroad Cross SoG in Scadu Altus and you can talk to Leda to advance her questline and get additional dialogue. NOTE: When you speak with Leda, she will mention going after the other NPCs.
Go to the Highroad Cross SoG in Scadu Altus and exhaust dialogue. You can use him against the Golden Hippopotamus boss later in the Shadow Keep

Return to the Main Gate Cross SoG and speak to Moore. You will have three dialogue options: Option 1: Put it behind you, if you choose this option, you will not see Moore again until much later, and w
Return to Count Ymir at the Cathedral of Manus Metyr and exhaust dialogue. This will give you the second ruins map and the Beloved Stardust Talisman
Given to you by Count Ymir after ringing the first bell in the Finger Ruins of Rhia
Will only appear after ringing the first bell. Speak to them to exhaust dialogue
Reset the area at the SoG and Count Ymir will have left. Go to his chair and interact with it. Then descend the ladder to the finger Ruins of Miyr
Found by descending the secret ladder hidden under Count Ymir's chair
Continue North and you will be invaded by this enemy. Defeat them to get the Claws of Night
Return to Jolan and speak to her about killing the Anna invader
Return to Count Ymir and speak to him about killing the Anna invader
To begin this section, return to the Highroad Cross SoG and continue North along the road, past where you encountered the Furnace Golem, and through the main gate of the Shadow Keep
Head inside the Shadow Keep gate, then take the elevator up. Found at the top
Found outside the boss door near the Shadow Keep Main Gate SoG
Continue through the boss gate. Drops Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns incantation and two Scadutree Fragments
Dropped by the Golden Hippopotamus boss
Found in the boss arena after defeating the Golden Hippopotamus
Continue into room in the North, then through the doorway in and up the ladder. This returns you to the room just before jumping down
Continue back out the door to the East and continue Southeast. Turn right to walk down a long ramp. Open the door to get another shortcut from the Main Gate Plaza SoG

Continue back up the long ramp and look to your right at the top. You will see a red summon sign to help Leda defeat Hornsent, and a gold summon sign to hep Hornsent defeat Leda. NOTE: You will need t

Defeating Hornsent will reward you with the Falx, Caterpillar Mask, Braided Cord Robe, Braided Arm wraps, and Soiled Loincloth. NOTE: You will need to complete Hornsent's questline on a different play
Defeating Leda will reward you with the Ash of War: Swift Slash. NOTE: You will need to complete Hornsent's questline on a different playthrough
Swipe at the wall on the Southwest side of this room to find an illusory wall
Continue through the new room and follow the path until you come to a coffin on a ledge. Interact with it to be taken to a new area
After arriving in the new location, continue out the door East and you will find this SoG. Rest here and return to the Main Gate Plaza SoG
Go through the shortcut leading to the large ramp and continue up the ramp. Continue Northeast and past the enemy and through the doorway. Take the lift up to this SoG
Continue to the Eastern side of the room to find this on a corpse
Continue out the doorway in the Western part of the room. Turn left and go down the stairs and into the large room with pillars. Continue out onto the bridge to find this SOG
On the Northwest section of this wall you'll find a lever, pull this to open a shortcut
Return to the bridge via the small pillar and look on the other side for the giant feet. Jump to these. Continue across and jump down to the "behemoth" statue below to find this

Jump down, head up the stairs to the Southeast, then continue to the Northwest portion of the library again. Go up the stairs, then up the next flight of stairs, continue to the South again, back acro
Found near the Storehouse, Fourth Floor SoG
Found near the Storehouse, Fourth Floor SoG
Found near the Storehouse, Fourth Floor SoG
Continue out the three windows and to the left. Continue up the stairs and then up the next stairs. Go down the stairs to your left. Go through the doorway on the right. Head toward the ledge then go

Return back outside, and up the stairs. Continue along to the Northeast and go through the doorway on the left. Follow the path to the right and then go up the flights of stairs until you see this SoG
Speak to Freyja here and exhaust dialogue

Return to the Storehouse, First Floor and to his room in the library and speak to Ansbach about Freyja. Then give him the Secret Rite Scroll. NOTE: You must speak to him about Freyja BEFORE giving him
Given to you from Ansbach once you meet Freyja in the Shadow Keep
Return to Freyja at the Storehouse, Seventh Floor SoG and give her the letter from Ansbach. Continue you to exhaust dialogue and she will eventually give you the Golden Lion Shield

Return to the Storehouse, First Floor. Continue around to the back of the large structure, to the Northeast side of the building. Turn right, go up the stairs. Continue Northeast until you see some st

Choosing to help Leda kill Ansbach will reward you with Ansbach's Set and Ansbach's Longbow. NOTE: You will need to complete the rest of Ansbach's questline on a different playthrough. It is recommend
Choosing to help Ansbach kill Leda will reward you with Ansbach's Longbow. NOTE: You will need to complete the rest of Leda's questline on a different playthrough
Found after you defeat Leda with Ansbach or if Leda was already killed prior to this encounter. NOTE: He will not be here if you choose to side with Leda and kill him

Head back to Highroad Cross SoG and speak to Leda if you've helped defeat Sir Ansbach and Hornsent. She will give you the Retaliatory Crossed-Tree Talisman and the Lacerating Crossed-Tree talisman. NO
Return to the Storehouse, Seventh Floor SoG. Head out the doorway again, Seventh Floor SoG and cross the stairs and bridge. Continue along and jump on the hanging statue to your left to find this

Return back across the stairs and bridge, then go down the stairs to your right. Go straight ahead and down more stairs, then go through the doorway to the Southeast. Continue along and pull this leve
Continue through the large door to find a Scadutree Fragment
Continue up the stairs from the fragment, and find this SoG
Return to the Church District Highroad SoG and head Northwest along the road to re-enter the Shadow Keep area. Continue through the tunnel and find this at the end

Jump to the rooftops to the Northwest. Make your way to the Southwest section of this first rooftop and jump to the log in the water. Jump to the right then go across the logs, continuing Southwest. o

Return the way you came and back to the first rooftop. Jump to the next rooftop area to the Northwest with the fallen in ceiling. Jump up the wall edge on the other side and head up and Northeast. Tur

Jump through the hole in the floor in the Southwest, then go out the doorway in the Northeast and across the area to another door. NOTE: You will need the Prayer Room Key found at the Church of Crusad

Found in the Prayer Room in the Shadow Keep. By this point, you should have the Iris of Occultation and the Iris of Grace. NOTE: You can only give him one of these, but he has two rewards. You will ne

steps.i: Give Queelign the Iris of Occultation
steps.n: If you give Queelign the Iris of Occultation, you will receive Queelign's Greatsword

steps.i: Give Queelign the Iris of Grace
steps.n: If you give Queelign the Iris of Grace, you will receive Fire Knight Queelign Spirit Ash

Leave the room, continue back around and then head Northwest. Go into the doorway on the other side of this room. Take the doorway on the left, then go left across the bridge and head Southeast. Go up
Go back down the ladder and through the doorway next to it. Drop down to the bottom of this tower. Go out the door and to the right to find this SoG
Head East and look for stairs up, and continue into the tower across the stairs and take the lift up. This is a shortcut back to the Church District Entrance SoG
Dropped by the second Lesser Ulcerated Spirit found in Shadow Keep after draining the water

Head toward the Northeast portion of the room and look to the right to find a lift. At the top continue across to the Northwest hallway. Take the first entryway on the left, and jump to the slender ar
Go back down the stairs, and head to the door below this balcony and take the lift down. You'll find this grace at the bottom
Continue through the tunnel and across the wooden bridge. Find this at the base of the altar
Follow the stairs down to find this grace and the boss arena
Found near the Tree-Worship Sanctum SoG. Drops the Remembrance of the Shadow Sunflower and Miquella's Great Rune
Dropped by the Scadutree Avatar boss near the Tree-Worship Sanctum SoG
Dropped by the Scadutree Avatar boss near the Tree-Worship Sanctum SoG
Found after defeating the Scadutree Avatar. Continue to the center of the boss arena to find this SoG

Return to the Sunken Chapel. Head out Northwest and cut to the right, then proceed through the archway on the left. Continue Northwest and take the lift to your right. Continue through the doorway ahe
Return to the previous room and look for a hole in the wall on the Southeast side of this floor and go through it. Turn right. Continue up the ramps and stairs to find this SoG

Jump back to the rafter. Head toward the Northwest and take the ladder on your left down. Head Northeast along this rafter and take the next ladder down. Head out the door to the North, turn right, an
Head into the room to the right of the Shadow Keep, Back Gate SoG and find this near the Marika statue
Perform the O Mother statue in front of the Marika statue and it will unlock and hidden door. This leads to the Hinterland SoG but we will return here later
Found outside the boss arena. NOTE: This will not be available if you sided with Leda and killed Hornsent
Return to Dark Chamber Entrance SoG and continue through the door to fight this boss. Drops the Remembrance of the Impaler and Messmer's Kindling
Found inside the boss arena

Dropped by Messmer the Impaler in Shadow Keep. NOTE: DO NOT DUPLICATE THIS REMEMBRANCE. The boss is required for the second playthrough, so there is no reason to duplicate this on your first playthrou
Dropped by Messmer the Impaler in Shadow Keep
Found in Messmer's boss arena after defeating him
Found in Messmer's boss arena after defeating him. Speak to him and exhaust dialogue
Return to the Highroad Cross SoG and find this letter
Go back up to the Shadow Keep, Back Gate SoG, then continue through the doorway to the Northeast to encounter this boss. Drops the Remembrance of the Wild Boar Rider

steps.i: Remembrance of the Wild Boar Rider
steps.n: Dropped by Commander Gaius near the Shadow Keep, Back Gate SoG
Head Northwest to find this SoG after defeating Commander Gaius
Head Northwest from the SoG and through the archway. Continue up the hill directly Northwest to find this
Continue North up the hill to find a large structure
Continue through the archway to find these. Five found in total here
Return to Jolan and speak to them about ringing the second bell
Speak to Count Ymir about ringing the second bell. You will be given the third ruins map
Given to you by Count Ymir after ringing the second bell. Purchase any remaining sorceries you may need from him as this will unlock another one for you
Speak to Count Ymir again and exhaust dialogue
Return to the Finger Ruins of Miyr below Count Ymir's chair (You may need to reload so he disappears). Ring this bell and you will be teleported to the boss arena
Found in the new location after ringing the Miyr bell and being teleported. Drops the Remembrance of the Mother of Fingers

steps.i: Remembrance of the Mother of Fingers
steps.n: Received for defeating Metyr, Mother of Fingers. NOTE: DO NOT DUPLICATE THIS REMEMBRANCE. The boss is required for the second playthrough, so there is no reason to duplicate this on your first playthr
Found in the boss arena after defeating Metyr, Mother of Fingers
Return to the cathedral above and make your way to Count Ymir's chair. You will be invaded by Jolan
Wait for Count Ymir to finish speaking after defeating Jolan, and he will begin attacking the player. Defeat him for the Maternal Staff and High Priest's Set.

Rest at the SoG after defeating Count Ymir and go back to Jolan to speak her. You will have the option to give her the Iris of Grace of the Iris of Occultation. NOTE: You will need to complete these s

steps.i: Giving Jolan the Iris of Grace
steps.n: Give Jolan the Iris of Grace to receive the Swordhand of Night Jolan Spirit Ashes and continue her questline

steps.i: Giving Jolan the Iris of Occultation
steps.n: Give Jolan the Iris of Occultation to get the Sword of Night katana and end her questline
From the Moorth Ruins SoG, head North/Northeast until you come across a pond of water. Continue across to the Northern edge and into a cave to find this
Head North from the Stone Cairn and down the ledges, and use the spirit spring near the rubble to jump up and to the Southeast. Go up the ledge and use the next spirit spring to jump up to the South,
To begin this section, return to the Moorth Ruins SoG. We will be doing the Ancient Ruins Base and getting the map before proceeding with the rest of the ruins
Look for a cave nearby where you found the Gravebird Gauntlets. Continue through the tunnel and this should pop you out near the SoG

From the Bloodfiend's Sacred Spear location, head East and you will find some archways with the door to this location beneath them. Continue in to rest at the SoG. NOTE: Contains lots of upgrade mater
Return to the Ancient Ruins Base SoG and continue Southwest and past two large golem enemies. You will find this near the spectral gravestones. Near the ledge. NOTE: Need to do this at night
Continue West from the Larval Tear and up onto the ledges to your left. Destroy this Stone Cairn
Continue West from the Larval Tear. You will find this on a pillar
Continue West from the map altar to find this location
If you take the right path after making your way into the ruins, you will eventually come across this grace
Head to the Southern side of the Temple Town Ruins and then continue South to the cliff edge to find this on an altar

Head back to the Temple Town Ruins and head in by going through a small hole in the wall. Head up the stairs to the right. Continue along the path to the roof and then drop down at the end. Turn aroun
Head North from the Ash of War from before and you will find this SoG

Continue along the river West. Follow this until you find the gravestones in the water and follow the water to the South/Southwest. You will come across the door to this area. Take the lift down to th
Head Northeast at night and look for ghostly gravestones in the grass.This will be in the center
Continue North from the Larval Tear and you will find this boss roaming the area. Drops the Roar of Rugalea
Return to the West Rampart SoG in the Shadow Keep
Take the doorway on the right and use the lift at the top of the stairs
Dropped by the first Hippopotamus enemy in the Ancient Ruins of Rauh
Dropped by the pot wielding shadow enemy when you first enter the structure to the Southwest

Head to the back of this room, and then take the hallway leading Northeast. Continue through the large door. Continue across the room to the other side and attack the large painting to discover this i
Dropped by the pot wielding shadow enemy further into the Ancient Ruins of Rauh
Jump back down and head Southwest. Continue under an archway and turn left. Continue under another two archways and you will be outside. Head Southeast  and you will find this
Found near the Rauh Ancient Ruins, East SoG
Found near the Rauh Ancient Ruins, East SoG
Found near the Rauh Ancient Ruins, East SoG
Continue South and over the hill to find this SoG
Head Southwest and into the ruins. Continue up the stairs to the left. Turn right and go further up the stairs. Find this on the North side of the large room in front of a shrine
Head through the square hole to the right of the chest. Take the lift on the right. Head East and find this SoG
Head down the nearby stairs and continue until you have to drop down to another platform. Head Northeast and jump down to the right and head into the next building to find this boss. Drops the Divine

Return to Ancient Ruins of Rauh, West SoG. Head Southwest and into the ruins. Continue up the stairs. Turn right and up more stairs. Head out the archway to the North. Find this in the large gazebo in
Dropped by the pot wielding shadow enemy in the Ancient Ruins of Rauh

Look to the tower to the Northeast and make sure you are lined up with the broken bridge on the other side. Ride across (this is an invisible bridge). Find this shrine in the center of the tower. If y
Head Northeast and up some rock. Continue North along the rockface and destroy this Stone Cairn to activate a spirit spring

Continue along this path and it will take you back to the stairs. Head up the stairs and you will be invaded by Hornsent. He will invade regardless of whether you sided with Leda before. Drops his Fal

steps.i: Church of the Bud, Main Entrance
steps.n: Continue up the stairs and to the left. Head outside to find this SoG
Through the entryway near the Church of the Bud, Main Entrance SoG. Drops the Remembrance of the Saint of the Bud

steps.i: Remembrance of the Saint of the Bud
steps.n: Dropped by Romina, Saint of the Bud in the Ancient Ruins of Rauh. NOTE: DO NOT DUPLICATE THIS REMEMBRANCE. The boss is required for the second playthrough, so there is no reason to duplicate this on y
Found in the Romina boss arena after defeating her
Head out the South doorway. Continue along the path and you will find a sealing tree. Examine it and choose to burn it. This will transport you to Enir-Ilim
To start this section, return to the Ellac River Cave SoG
Continue South across the stone pillars path and you will eventually find this SoG
Continue along the Ellac river, heading South until you find this SoG
Head West and continue past a couple of larger structures to find this SoG
Return to the central part of this ravine with the Demi-Human enemies, and head North. There will be a cave you can go into with a Demi-Human chief enemy
Continue through the ravine until you exit onto a beach. You will find this boss near another stone structure. Defeat this boss to receive the Star-Lined Sword
Climb to the top of the large stone structure near the Demi-Human boss
Head Southeast from the Perfumed Oil of Ranah to find this location on the other island
Found inside the Southern Nameless Mausoleum. Drops the Dancing Blade of Ranah and the Dancing Set

Return to the passage/cave from before. Continue through to where you had dropped down, then take the East tunnel. Head East and then North and you will come one near where you can find this on a larg
Return to the Cerulean Coast SoG and head directly South. This boss will fly in and attack you. Drops a Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone and a Dragon Heart
Dropped by the Ghostflame Dragon found South of the Cerulean Coast SoG
Dropped by the Ghostflame Dragon found South of the Cerulean Coast SoG
Continue South past where you encountered the Ghostflame Dragon to find this on an altar
Continue Southeast and you will find this SoG
Found just Northeast of the Cerulean Coast Cross SoG
Found just Northeast of the Cerulean Coast Cross SoG

Return to where you found the map of this region, just Northeast of the Cerulean Coast Cross SoG. Continue East and past the large stone coffin you had used to get the cookbook before, and look for th

Return to Cerulean Coast Cross SoG. Go North toward where you found the map from before. Head East until you come to the beach, and head past the stone structure on your left. Just past it, head direc
Continue along the coast line to the East, then head North on top of and over a stone structure. Found on a cliff edge overlooking the ruins
From the Finger Ruins of Rhia SoG, head East along the path, passing the hill leading down. Eventually you'll have to turn North and look for this near the cliff edge
Head back toward the Finger Ruins of Rhia SoG, then turn North and head down the hill. Continue North until you find the fingers coming up from the ground and to a point
There will be a bell that you can interact with after obtaining the Hole-Laden Necklace. Doing so will reward you with the Crimson Seed Talisman +1. This will also advance Count Ymir's questline

Head to the Northwest portion of the ruins and look for a hill you can climb up. At the top head back South and you will eventually come across a small forest. Find this structure in the forest. Conta
Head back to the large hole in the ground. Look for a safe way down and delve into this area to find this SoG
Enter the cave near The Fissure SoG and you will this SoG

Return to the Stone Coffin Fissure SoG. Continue dropping down ledges, making your way East to a ledge that will break from under you. At the bottom, continue Northeast/East and you will find this nea
Found near the Fissure Cross SoG
Found near the Fissure Cross SoG

Return to the Fissure Cross SoG. Head directly North and begin jumping down the stone coffins. Continue Northeast and around the cliff edge, then head North up another stone coffin. Jump down, then ju
Continue up the hill to the East, then head Southeast along this upper section to find this SoG
Go up to the head near the ghost, or Southwest of the Fissure Depths SoG up the stairs, and jump off
Found inside the boss arena of the Putrescence Knight. You can summon him for this battle
Found at the bottom of the hole after jumping down near the Fissure Depths SoG. Drops the Remembrance of Putrescence
Dropped by the Putrescence Knight in the Fissure
Found after defeating the Putrescence Knight
Speak to Thiollier, then reload the area and speak to him again
Return to St. Trina. You will need to Imbibe Nectar four times in order to have St. Trina speak to you
Speak to her after drinking the Nectar four times and you will receive additional dialogue
Speak to Thiollier and try to pass on the words of St Trina. Then try to pass them on again
Return to the Garden of Deep Purple SoG and head for St Trina's cave, and Thiollier should invade here. Drops St. Trina's Smile once defeated
Go back into the cave and speak to Thiollier again
Die by Imbibing St. Trina's Nectar twice for another piece of lore
Speak to Thiollier again and pass on St Trina's most recent words
To begin this section, return to the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion. Continue Southwest past the dragon corpse. Look for a path heading West
Head back down the hill from before. Continue Northwest/West to find this SoG

Now that we have the SoGhere, head back South toward where you fought the Tibia Mariner, then head West. Look over the ledges for a large stone coffin you can jump to (this is above the Cerulean Coast
Continue Northwest under the stone arch and this boss will appear above the water. Drops the Ash of War: Ghostflame Call
Dropped by the hippopotamus enemy in the Charo's Hidden Grave
Head Northwest and drop down to the right. Continue North, dropping down some ledges. Continue past the cages in the ground and you will find this location
Dropped by the Magma Wyrm inside the Dragon's Pit
Dropped by the Magma Wyrm inside the Dragon's Pit

Drop down hole to the West of this room and make your way to the bottom of this room. Continue through the South tunnel and into the large room. Drop down into the dark abyss below to find the boss ro
Continue through the door in this boss room to find this SoG. We will return to this path later on
To begin this section, return to the Dragon Pit Terminus SoG
Head outside and continue East. Fight this and it will drop a Dragon Heart
Dropped by the first Jagged Peak Drake
Continue South from Igon's Cookbook 1 and you will find this location

Found near the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion. Exhaust her dialogue and she will eventually give you the option to receive the Ancient Dragon's Blessing. NOTE: You can choose to give Thiollier's Conc

steps.i: Giving Thiollier's Concoction to the Dragon Communion Priestess
steps.n: Wait until nightfall and you will see the Dragon Communion Priestess speaking to Lord Placidsax. Speak to her and give her Thiollier's Concoction. NOTE: This does lock you out of the Priestess Heart a
Return to the spirit spring. Use the spirit spring to ascend to the East, then head Southeast to a bridge. Cross it and find this SoG on the other side

From here, head South. Jump up to the left and you'll notice to Jagged Peak Drakes. If you get close enough to them so that their health bar shows, you will notice they are damaging each other. You ca
Two are dropped by the Jagged Peak Drakes just past the Foot of the Jagged Peak SoG
Found East of the two Jagged Peak Drakes. Exhaust dialogue and he will drop the Igon's Furled Finger
Given by Igon in Jagged Peak after defeating the Jagged Peak Drakes in the area
Continue past Igon and up the next two spirit springs. Head through the canyon to the South. Hug the right side to avoid the boulders and continue making your way up. Find this against the wall below
Head Northeast/East and find this boss in the water. Drops an Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone and Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone
Dropped by Ancient Dragon Senessax in the Jagged Peak
Dropped by Ancient Dragon Senessax in the Jagged Peak
Continue North and up the steep hill. Find this SoG at the top

From the Jagged Peak Mountainside SoG, head Southwest along the mountain. Once you pass a pale dragon corpse embeded in the rock, climb up the rock to the right of the descending path, still going Sou

Return toward the SoG, then head Southwest up the hill. Take the spirit spring up and continue Southwest. Curve around South and go up another spirit spring. Turn to the Northwest and follow this path
Return to the last spirit spring and jump down, then use it to jump back up to the higher area. Head East and find this guarded by slime enemies
You will find another spirit spring that leads to this SoG
Find Igon's summon sign and summon him for the fight against Bayle. You need to activate the fight, then head back toward the entrance to find his summon sign
Found just past the Jagged Peak Summit SoG. Drops the Heart of Bayle upon defeat
Dropped by Bayle the Dread in the Jagged Peak
Appears in Bayle's boss arena once defeated

Return to the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion and speak to the Dragon Communion Priestess if you gave her the Thiollier's Concoction earlier in the guide. Speak to her  and allow her to follow you. Th
From here, follow the water North/Northwest to find this near the rock face
Begin this section by returning to the Castle Watering Hole SoG near Shadow Keep

Crafter a Hefty Furnace Pot (you will have gotten the cookbook for this already if you followed the guide). Climb the top of the ruins near the Furnace Golem and throw the Hefty Furnace Pot into the "
Found to the East of the Castle Watering Hole SoG
Go back behind the Ruins of Unte and find this on an altar
Continue South along the rock face. You will find this next to a cliff ledge

Head South along the ledges. Jump across to the ledge on your left and head Northwest. At the end of this path, look to the North and jump to the closest stone pillar. Carefully descend to the next hi
Make your way back around the canyon, and head toward the South along a new path. Look to your left to find a ledge you can jump down to that has this SoG

Return to the Recluses' River Downstream SoG. Head South and down some ledges. Keep an eye out on your right for a path you can take through the rock face. Continue up the hill through this path to fi
Head into the cave to the Northeast and follow this path. You will eventually find this Mausoleum to the left of another waterfall
Return back through the cave from before, then head South, then head East to the forested area and find two hippopotamus enemies you can kill, each dropping a Scadutree Fragment

Head back toward the West, and then look for the ledges that lead further down to the South. Continue as the path curves Southeast and then East, and continue dropping down ledges. You will eventually
Begin this area by heading South from the Forsaken Graveyard SoG
Continue South from the Forsaken Graveyard SoG and you will find this SoG along the path
Continue Southeast along the path and you will come up to this map on a pillar
Just beyond the Map: Abyssal Woods location
Found in the Church Ruins in the Abyssal Woods. Two are found here
Return to the Woodland Trail SoG, then head West until you find this SoG
Head West from the Abyssal Woods SoG. You will come to a body of water with two waterfalls to the West of it. Look for the SoG to the right

From the Mad Craftsman's Cookbook 2, head Northwest and find a way to drop down to your left. Once you do so, head South and continue dropping down small ledges. You will eventually see a structure in
Found just inside the doorway of Midra's Manse, found in the Southwest part of the Abyssal Woods
To the East of the Manse Hall SoG, you will see a painting. Hit it and you will reveal a passageway
Head through the illusory wall and into the first room on the left to find this

Continue through the hallway and into the next room, then take the first left. Go in this room, take a right and another right between the wall and the pillar. Continue to the back of the room and you
Head out the doorway, back to the rafters, and turn right. Go straight into the next room to find this SoG
Head out the doorway and look for a ladder to the right. Climb down and turn around, go behind the shelf and into the room. Enter the doorway on the other side to open the shortcut
In the room leading to the shortcut, strike the large painting and reveal the illusory wall
Continue through the new room and up the stairs, then up the ladder. Continue to the other side and pull the lever
Drop down to the North. Kill the giant enemy just below you to get this
Go up the stairs to the East. Continue through the first room and into the next room to find this
Continue to the North to find a ladder to kick down
Do not climb down the ladder. Instead, jump across to the chandelier to get this
Go through the doorway to the East from the Second Floor Chamber SoG to find the boss gate to the left. Go through to fight this boss. Drops remembrance of the Lord of Frenzied Flame

steps.i: Remembrance of the Lord of Frenzied Flame
steps.n: Dropped by Midra, Lord of Frenzied Flame in Midra's Manse
Found after defeating Midra

Once you interact with the sealing tree, you will be transported to Enir-Ilim. Look for the SoG once you arrive. NOTE: We are not doing this area yet. We are just getting the SoG and will return later
To begin this section, return to the Enir-Ilim: Outer Wall SoG we had found earlier in the guide
Continue up the stairs. Head up the stairs to the right, then the stairs on the left and into the room. Jump up the small square ledges to get to this SoG
Head Southeast and down some stairs. Take the lift down. This opens a shortcut to Belurat

Head back up the lift and back into the First Rise room. Head out the archway in the Southwest part of the room, and up the stairs. Go through the room on the right to the other side and kill the larg
Head down the stairs to the Southeast, just past the fountain. At the bottom of the stairs, continue to the Northwest. find this near some man fly enemies in front of an altar
Drop down to the tree branch below this platform and head back Southwest. Continue up the stairs to your right, heading Northwest. Continue up the stairs to your right. Go through the door at the top
Found near the Spiral Rise SoG
Found near the Spiral Rise SoG

Head back through the hall, and drop down out the entryway to the right onto the stairs below. Head up these stairs and carefully drop to the ledge through the opening to the South. Drop to the East t

Return to the Spiral Rise SoG. head up the stairs. Jump out the window on the left and head Southwest and then Northwest along the rooftops. Jump to the next section of building and head into the room

Head through the doorway on the right and head up the ladder. Head out of the tower and head up another ladder. Jump to the rooftops to the North, and head into the building in the Northwest to find t
Drop down to the room below. Head out the doorway to the Northeast, down the stairs and into the next room, and through the doorway to the right to get this
Head up the stairs to the South and head into the next building to find this SoG
Found near the Cleansing Chamber Ante Room SoG in Enir-Ilim

Head through the East doorway and up the stairs. Listen to Leda's speech and then she will disappear. To start this boss fight, you will need to interact with the red summon sign. You can summon Sir A
Available if you failed to complete the questlines for Sir Ansbach, Hornsent, and Thiollier
Available for summon here if you sided with him during Leda's questline
Only available if you did not side with Sir Ansbach or Hornsent during Leda's questline
Fight Leda by interacting with her red summon sign AFTER you summon whichever NPCs you would like to help. Drops Leda's Sword
Head up the stairs to the North. Take the lift up. Speak to Sir Ansbach and exhaust dialogue. Ask about the other NPCs
If you completed all steps of Thiollier's questline up to this point, you can summon him for the final boss fight. Should be to the left of the fog gate
Continue up the stairs and find this SoG before the boss fog
You can summon Sir Ansbach for the fight against Promised Consort Radahn

Just past the Divine Gate Front Staircase SoG. Drops the remembrance of a God and a Lord. NOTE: At certain points in the fight, the boss will try to grab you and put a spell on you. Let him do this tw

steps.i: Remembrance of a God and a Lord
steps.n: Dropped by Promised Consort Radahn. NOTE: YOU WILL NEED TO DUPLICATE THIS REMEMBRANCE IF YOU WANT EVERYTHING IN TWO PLAYTHROUGHS
Found in the Promised Consort Radahn boss arena after defeat
Touch the glowing light in the center of the arena to get this cutscene. Doing so will grant you the Circlet of Light
From the Stone-Sheathed Sword, look to the left when facing away from the altar and go down the ladder on the left. Turn right in the next room and drop down the hole. Head through the archway in the
Return to the larger staircase at the beginning of the large room, go up, and then turn left and climb the path of rubble. Go through the hallway to the right and take the ladder down. Pull the lever
Drop down from the lever, then run and jump to the nearly descended large pipe coming out of the lava. Jump off to the right, then go up the stairs. Interact with the fire altar to receive this item
Head to the left side of the bridge in the large room, then pull the lever to reveal a doorway
Return to the platform, then jump down onto the bridge below. Continue across and to the left to pull another lever
Begin heading back to the last room with the lever, but look for another lever on your left just before entering the room. Once pulled, the door will go up again, so step just outside of the corridor
Jump back to the pillar and head up to the top of it. Jump down to the left. And head Northwest. Look out on the balcony to the left of this room to find this
Turn back and drop down to your left. Head Northeast through the corridor. Turn right and jump over the railing. Head through the corridor Southwest. Turn left and go up the ladder at the end of this
Drop down to the Southwest of this room to the platform. Drop to the right. Wait for the pillar to be fully dropped into the alva. Head Northwest to the end of the path and you will see a broken wall
Received from examining the Taylew Altar in Taylew Ruins
Head through the tunnel. Take the first left and head down the stairs. Continue across to the Northeast. Head down more stairs and take a left. Take a right down more stairs and head through the next

Head back and take the first set of stairs on your left and head up. Follow the tunnel and head straight across, jump down. Turn left and head down the lift. Head Southeast and turn right. Continue do
Go back up the ladder. Head Southwest and take a left, then head into the tunnel to the Southeast. Continue up the stairs and into the next tunnel. Take the first right and head down the lift to find
